message:
Add --emit-bytecode CLI + subprocess eval + import path passing

- Add --emit-bytecode flag to compile Python to bytecode binary format
- Add bytecode serialization/deserialization (PYBC format)
- Implement subprocess spawning for runtime eval cache misses
- Pass import paths via PYAOT_SOURCE_DIR env var
- Embed __pyaot_source_dir in generated binaries for runtime eval
